# 🚫 Protected Files — Do Not Edit Without Explicit Approval

> Files in this list are either **auto-generated**, **system-critical**, or **shared infrastructure**. Editing them without explicit user approval is the #1 source of cross-cutting regressions in this codebase.

If a task seems to require touching one of these files, **stop and ask the user first**.

---

## 🔒 Tier 1 — NEVER edit (auto-overwritten or platform-managed)

| Path | Why it is protected | Correct alternative |
|---|---|---|
| `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts` | Auto-generated by Lovable Cloud on schema sync | Import from this file; never modify it |
| `src/integrations/supabase/types.ts` | Auto-generated from the live DB schema | Add columns via a migration; the file regenerates |
| `.env` | Managed by Lovable Cloud; contains `VITE_SUPABASE_*` | Add new secrets via Lovable secrets tool |
| `bun.lock`, `bun.lockb` | Generated by `bun install` | Use `code--add_dependency` |
| `supabase/migrations/*.sql` (already deployed) | Migrations are append-only after deploy | Write a NEW reverse migration |
| `supabase/config.toml` (project-level keys) | Project-level settings managed by Lovable | Per-function blocks may be added when registering a new edge function |

## 🔒 Tier 2 — Edit ONLY with explicit user approval

| Path | Blast radius | What to ask first |
|---|---|---|
| `src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx` | Auth + every protected page | "May I change the auth logic? It will affect every signed-in flow." |
| `src/apps/shared/hostname.ts` | Surface routing across all 4 surfaces (admin/member/trainer/staff) | "Changing surface detection / cross-surface URLs — confirm?" |
| `src/App.tsx` (route table) | Every page mount | Confirm route additions/removals before editing |
| `src/hooks/useRealtimeSync.ts` | All TanStack Query cache invalidation | **Only ADD tables, never remove.** Removing a table silently breaks live updates elsewhere |
| `src/components/ui/*` (shadcn primitives) | Every dialog/button/form in the app | Never modify — wrap in a new component instead |
| `src/lib/queryKeys.ts` | Every query/mutation cache key | Adding new keys is OK; renaming requires updating all callers |
| RLS policies (in any migration) | Data-isolation boundary | Always preferred via new migration; never disable RLS to "fix" a query |

## 🔒 Tier 3 — High-impact shared utilities (read full file before touching)

| Path | Why it matters |
|---|---|
| `src/lib/activityLogger.ts` | Powers the `activity_log` audit trail (compliance requirement) |
| `src/lib/dateRange.ts` | `getBangkokDayRange()` — wrong day boundaries silently corrupt every stats query |
| `src/lib/formatters.ts` | Date/money formatters used across all surfaces |
| `src/lib/gamificationEvents.ts` | Event-key contract — wrong key = no XP awarded |
| `src/i18n/locales/en.ts` + `th.ts` | EN/TH must stay in parity (run `node scripts/compare-i18n.mjs`) |
| `supabase/functions/_shared/*` | Shared CORS/auth/db helpers used by every edge function |

---

## How to use this list

1. **Before** calling `code--write`, `code--line_replace`, `code--rename`, or `code--delete`, check this file.
2. If the target path matches a Tier-1 entry → **stop**. Use the correct alternative.
3. If it matches Tier-2 → ask the user explicitly for approval, naming the blast radius.
4. If it matches Tier-3 → read the entire file before editing, and confirm your change does not break callers.

This is a defensive policy. It costs ~10 seconds of reading per edit. It saves hours of regression repair.
